info.name: Peer Learning System
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Collaborative Peer Learning & Knowledge Exchange Agent

Covers all 11 phases:
  1. Data Ingestion — Import student profiles
  2. Pair Formation — Hungarian algorithm matching
  3. Interactive Sessions — LLM-powered questions with Bloom's progression
  4. Performance Scoring — Learner & teacher evaluation
  5. Improved Pool — Students who mastered a topic
  6. Waiting Queue — Notification system for teacher availability
  7. Group Sessions — 3-student collaborative learning
  8. Teacher Gap Resolution — Teachers improve their own gaps
  9. Question Bank — Persistent question storage & analytics
  10. Verification — Certified mastery
  11. Completion — Full mastery report

request.description: Check system health: DB connection status, LLM model, and app version.
Root endpoint showing system name and links to docs/health.

Phase 1: Import student data from JSON. Accepts raw array or {students: [...]}.
Sorts gaps: FUNDAMENTAL_GAP first, by confidence descending.
Sets current_weak_topic to the first sorted gap.
Sorted knowledge gaps for a student (FUNDAMENTAL_GAP first).
Full session history: pair_sessions, group_sessions, improved/mastered topics.

Run the full Hungarian algorithm matching for ALL topics.

Internally:
1. Loads all free students + waiting queue
2. For each topic: builds cost matrix via compatibility scores, runs linear_sum_assignment
3. Creates pair sessions for optimal matches
4. Matches remaining new students with waiting queue
5. Auto-queues unmatched students
6. Saves batch_pairing_record

Individual matching for the authenticated user.
Optionally pass an access_token to refresh student data from a URL.
Uses atomic findOneAndUpdate to prevent race conditions.
Returns: 'in_pair_session', 'in_group_session', 'waiting', or 'idle'.
All pair sessions in DB — active, completed, abandoned — newest first.
Students waiting for a teacher, sorted by priority score descending.
Generate next Bloom's taxonomy question via gemma4 for a specific session ID.

Auto-resolve the authenticated learner's active session and generate the next question.
No session_id needed.
Submit answer for a specific session. Evaluated via LLM, updates mastery score dynamically.

Auto-resolve the authenticated learner's active session and submit answer.
No session_id needed.

Request a hint for the current question. Max 3 hints per session.
Hints are progressive: subtle → specific → almost-solution.

Phase 4: Complete session and calculate scores.

Learner outcomes:
  ≥85% → MASTERED → enters improved pool (Phase 5)
  50-84% → CONTINUE
  <50% → REGROUP

Teacher score:
  <50% → NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT → teacher's own gaps marked (Phase 8)
Overall performance summary: mastery scores, sessions count, avg scores.
Performance history for a specific student-topic pair.
Phase 11: Full completion report — initial vs final mastery, topics mastered, sessions completed.

item.name: Create Topic Pool
item.description: Create or verify an improved pool entry for a topic.

request.description: Aggregated pool info for all topics: student count, avg mastery.
All students in the improved pool for a specific topic.
Retrieve all notifications for the authenticated student, newest first.

Accept a pairing notification. If teacher: activates session immediately.
Returns session_id for redirect to live room.

Form a group session from improved pool. Requires >= 3 students.
Assigns roles: EXPLAINER (highest mastery), SOLVER (middle), REVIEWER (lowest).
Generates collaborative problem via gemma4.

Submit role scores for a group session.
When all 3 members submit: computes avg, checks verification criteria.
Score ≥90% → increments consecutive counter.
Score <50% → back to pair programming.
Manually generate a Bloom's taxonomy question via gemma4 for any topic.
Manually evaluate a student answer against a question's expected answer via LLM.
All stored questions for a topic with analytics (success rate, avg hints, usage count).
Get live room details for a session. Creates room if it doesn't exist.
Auto-resolve authenticated user's active session and get/create the live room.
Check if a session is ready to join (scheduled time elapsed, status is active).
Join a live room. Marks participant as online.
Leave a live room. Marks participant as offline.
Close a live room permanently.

WebSocket for real-time push notifications.
Receives: pairing_success, queue_entry, no_teachers_available, knowledge_gap_completed.
